solutions.solution:
(D) As, ? = X
16 - 3 = 13
P C M
and 26 - 12 = 14
Z L N
20 - 17 = 3
T O C
∴ ? = C (letter at 3rd position in the English alphabet).

(C) Sum of the letter positions is multiplied by 5.
As, (20 + 6) × 5 = 130
T F
Similarly, (12 + 2) × 5 = 70
L B
∴ ? = 70

(C) Letter position of 1st letter is divided by letter position of 2nd letter.
12 ÷ 4 = 3    9 ÷ 3 = 3    15 ÷ 5 = 3
L D           I C         O E
Similarly, 26 ÷ 2 = 13
Z B
∴ ? = 13

(C) Number = Product of letter positions / 2
As, (3 × 14) ÷ 2 = 21    (20 × 22) ÷ 2 = 220
C N                      T V
and (6 × 11) ÷ 2 = 33
F K
Similarly, (12 × 9) ÷ 2 = 54
L I
∴ ? = 54

(C) In each row, each of the letters A, B, C must appear once. In each column, the product of the first and third number is equal to the second number.
∴ Missing number = (8 × 2) = 16
and missing letter = C
∴ ? = 16 C
Hence, option (a) is the correct answer.

(C) Given numbers are sum of the given letters' positions.
As, 2 + 3 = 5
B C
20 + 18 = 38
T R
and 12 + 7 = 19

Similarly, L G
24 + 14 = 38
X N
Hence, option (c) is the correct answer.
(C) As, 3 × 6 × 14 × 20 = 5040
C F N T
Similarly, 7 × 11 × 4 × 16 = 4928
G K D P
Hence, 4928 will come in place of question mark.

(D) The positional values of the letters in each row are incremented by 2 to get the next letter.
Hence, missing letter = I → K
In each row, 1st number + 2nd number = 3rd number
∴ Missing number = 3 + 5 = 8
∴ ? = K 8
Hence, option (b) is the correct answer.

(D) Starting from letter A in clockwise direction,
A +2→ C +2→ E +2→ G +2→ I +2→ K
+2→ M +2→ O
Starting from number 8 in anti-clockwise direction (prime number addition sequence)
8 +3→ 11 +5→ 16 +7→ 23 +11→ 34 +13→
47 +17→ 64 +19→ 83
∴ ? = O and 83
Hence, option (b) is the correct answer.

(D) Starting from letter A in anti-clockwise direction,
A +2→ C +3→ F +4→ J +5→ O +6→ U
Starting from number 4 in anti-clockwise direction
22 = 4, 32 = 9, 42 = 16, 52 = 25, 62 = 36
∴ ? = U and 36
Hence, option (b) is the correct answer.

(C) The letters form a repetitive sequence of vowels.
A, E, I, O, U, A, E (outer side)
On the inner side, (right half part)
(7 - 3)3 = 64 and (8 - 2)3 = 216
On inner side (left half part) (5 - 4)3 = 1
and (11 - 8)3 = 27
∴ ? = E and 27
Hence, option (c) is the correct answer.
